summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Polyglot AI Translation App - Iteration 3. All new features (Landing page, API key auth, public API, webhooks, integrations page) working correctly. All 18 backend tests pass. Frontend UI fully functional with 7 tabs and 5 integration section tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API key authentication properly validates keys and returns 401 for invalid/missing keys
WhatsApp and Voice webhooks return proper TwiML responses
API keys are properly masked in GET /api/keys response
Landing page bento-grid capabilities expand/collapse works correctly
All 7 navigation tabs (Home, Text, Voice, Sign→Text, Text→Sign, API, History) functional
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app. API keys are generated dynamically via POST /api/keys/generate
seed_data_creation: Test API keys and translations created during testing are stored in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 adds: Landing page with bento-grid capabilities, public API with key auth (/api/v1/translate), API key management (/api/keys/generate, /api/keys), WhatsApp webhook (/api/webhooks/whatsapp), Voice webhook (/api/webhooks/voice), API docs (/api/docs/endpoints), Integrations page with 5 section tabs (REST API, Widget, Chrome Extension, WhatsApp, Phone Calls). All core translation features from iterations 1-2 remain functional.

landing_page.details: Hero section with CTA buttons, stats bar (100+ languages, 8 sign languages, 5+ integrations, <2s latency), capabilities bento-grid with 5 cards (Translator, Voice, Messages, Documents, API), integration highlight cards (WhatsApp, Phone Calls, Chrome Extension, REST API)

capabilities_grid.details: All 5 capability cards present and expand/collapse works. Each card shows features list when expanded with navigation button.

tab_navigation.details: All 7 tabs (Home, Text, Voice, Sign→Text, Text→Sign, API, History) clickable and show correct components

api_key_generation.details: POST /api/keys/generate creates key with pk_ prefix, GET /api/keys returns masked keys list

public_api_translation.details: POST /api/v1/translate works with valid X-Api-Key header, returns 401 without key or with invalid key

widget_translation.details: POST /api/widget/translate works with valid API key, returns 401 without key

whatsapp_webhook.details: GET returns status, POST returns TwiML response with <Message> tag

voice_webhook.details: POST returns TwiML response with <Say> and <Gather> tags for speech input

api_docs.details: GET /api/docs/endpoints returns documentation with 11 endpoints listed

integrations_page.details: 5 section tabs (REST API, Widget, Chrome Extension, WhatsApp, Phone Calls) all functional. API key generation UI works, Test API Call button executes and shows result.

text_translation.details: Language pickers, swap button, translate button all work. Translation API returns correct response.

history.details: History page loads and displays translation items correctly

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/supported-languages: PASS - Returns 100+ spoken languages and 8 sign languages
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/translate: PASS - Translates text using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/keys/generate: PASS - Creates API key with pk_ prefix
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/v1/translate: PASS - Public API with key auth works, 401 without key
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/widget/translate: PASS - Widget endpoint with key auth works
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/webhooks/voice: PASS - Returns TwiML with Gather for speech

mocked_apis.note: WhatsApp and Phone Call webhooks are ready endpoints but require Twilio account to fully test. The webhook logic is real but Twilio connection is not configured.
